channel.title: Bangkit on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Bangkit on Home

item.title: MBKM EvalAuto: Streamlined Mentor Evaluation System
item.description: MBKM EvalAuto is an automation tool designed to simplify the evaluation process for mentors in the Kampus Merdeka (MBKM) program. It efficiently transfers initial and final evaluation scores from Bangkit Academy’s Google Sheet (xlsx) directly into the MBKM platform.
